title: Importing Update Data to an Existing Group
excerpt: I am attempting to import data into the first group of my board, the first group contains incorrect information. The issue arises when the imported data automatically updates the second group instead of the first, where …

posts.author: JDAY (Jared Yousif)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am attempting to import data into the first group of my board, the first group contains incorrect information. The issue arises when the imported data automatically updates the second group instead of the first, where I intend it to go. Is there a method to specify which group should be updated when overwriting existing item information during the import process?

Any ideas? I happy screenshots or details needed to troubleshoot.

posts.author: ZakiImtiaz (Zaki | readylogic.co)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @JDAY ,

To import data from Sheets, make sure that the data fields and columns are perfectly matched. Also, ensure that you have selected the correct group during the import setup.

posts.author: jamespatten (James Patten)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @JDAY

If you’re still looking for this, then you can import an Excel/CSV into an existing group with the monday app Data Importer

I’ve put together a tutorial specifically for this too.

I hope it helps, do feel free to reach out if any questions!

James

Screenshot 2025-01-04 at 11.52.091058×727 28.8 KB

posts.author: staskodro (Kostas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dear @ZakiImtiaz, i have the same issue and have tried many times to update an existing contacts group with importing an excel file but the procedure always creates new group; it never updates the existing group. Also there is place to select a specific group during the import setup. Are there more details instructions for this?

Thank you in advance.
